name: Jennifer Holliday
abstract: Jennifer Yvette Holliday (born October 19, 1960) is an American singer and actress. She started her career on Broadway in musicals such as Your Arms Too Short to Box with God (1980–1981) and Dreamgirls (1981–1983), and later became a successful recording artist.

about_quotes.speaker: Michael Abene
about_quotes.evidence: this wonderful singer, Jennifer Holliday, who did the original “Dream Girls” cast is a wonderful singer. We just did some symphony stuff for her for a concert in New York.
